text:
Market today: The bond market is spooked by Iran tensions, pushing mortgage rates up and oil prices down. This isn't directly hitting tech, but the general market jitters could affect sentiment.

Your holdings: SOXL is still in the red (-20.92%) and needs watching, especially with its leveraged nature and decay. SPAL is also down (-20.56%) and volatile. PTNM is down (-15.25%) and a tiny spec.

Watch: Keep an eye on the broader market reaction to the Middle East tensions. Any sustained downturn could pressure your concentrated tech book.

Bottom line: Your leveraged positions are the main concern right now, alongside general market sentiment.
plays: SOXL: Watch stop at 200. Leveraged ETFs decay and amplify losses.
SPAL: Watch stop at 21.38. This is a fast-moving, leveraged ETF.
No new buys today - hold and watch
